title: 2 pcs water discs, Frisbee splash, water throwing disc made of foam and silicone, water splash disc, water splash disc, throwing disc water game
features: 2 x water Frisbee foam for water games in summer.
Simply dipped in water, the disc absorbs water through its pores and stores it. When throwing, playing and catching, the water is then splashed around in a fun way.
Simply submerge under water and then throw like a Frisbee - this is how summer is fun.
The inside of the eye-catching throwing discs is filled with foam and so they retain their shape - and they are also super soft thanks to the very soft silicone!
Whether at the pool, in the outdoor pool or on the beach - the extra soft water Frisbee is perfect as a water game
description: Features: These water discs are made of soft silicone material inside, which is gentle to the touch and durable for long hours of play. They are designed for children to play in the pool, beach or any outdoor water environment. Specifications: Material: TRR Size: 17 cm in diameter Color: Red Blue Package Included: 2 x Water Discs, Frisbee Splash
